text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 280 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_MO_2M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Pharmacy - days in 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 2-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_DAYS_MO_2M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8
